title: Crispy Shrimp Fritters with Stir-Fry Sauce
description: A Dutch-inspired appetizer with crispy shrimp fritters served with a sweet and spicy stir-fry sauce. Perfect for a quick snack or light meal.
instructions: 1. In a large bowl, combine flour, egg, and buttermilk. Stir until just combined. Do not overmix.
2. Add crushed Dutch crunch cookies to the bowl and stir until just combined.
3. Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes.
4. Heat vegetable oil in a deep frying pan to 350°F.
5. Using a spoon, drop small balls of the shrimp mixture into the hot oil.
6. Fry the fritters for 2-3 minutes on each side, or until golden brown and crispy.
7. Remove the fritters from the oil with a slotted spoon and place on a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
8. Serve the fritters hot with a side of stir-fry sauce for dipping.
